extension.description: Relay localhost workspace notifications to the local Window Flash Notify UI extension.
command.copyCurlCommand.title: Window Flash Notify Relay: Copy Curl Command
command.testFlash.title: Window Flash Notify Relay: Test Flash
configuration.title: Window Flash Notify Relay
configuration.basePort.description: First port to try when starting the workspace notification HTTP server.
configuration.portSearchRange.descriptio: Number of ports to try, starting from windowFlashNotifyRelay.basePort.
configuration.listenHost.description: Host address for the workspace HTTP server. Keep 127.0.0.1 for local-only access from hooks running on the same workspace machine.
configuration.authToken.description: Optional token required in the X-Window-Flash-Token header or token query parameter.
